name: studio.get_settings
description: Read the settings object for an Actium Studio site: locale, timezone, analytics IDs, feature toggles.
whenToUse: Pre-flight read before studio.update_settings — fetch current values so the caller can patch only what changes.
Diagnostic: 'why is this site showing dates in the wrong timezone' — inspect settings.timezone.
Analytics wiring check: confirm the configured analytics_id matches the operator's expected property.
whenNotToUse: Caller wants per-page SEO settings — use studio.get_page; settings are site-level only.
Caller wants theme tokens (colors, fonts) — use studio.get_theme; settings and theme are separate.
Caller needs real-time analytics traffic — use studio.get_analytics_overview; settings only reports configuration.
